violations.text: Paper menus lack an allergen statement. PIC informed marketing during inspection. They are in the process of reprinting. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The hand-washing sink (near lowboy) in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (lid and chopper blades) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized on site. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Knives and rubber spatula were observed stored on an unclean surface (top of lowboy unit) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC washed/sanitized and stored on clean sheet tray. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Inspector observed scoop with handle in contact with food product. Utensils must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. PIC removed scoop. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Cardboard is used in the construction of shelf protector in the dry storage area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelf above 3 bay sink have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
Menu board and/or order station does not have an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (food chopper) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed in dish sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Working containers of liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. PIC labeled items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Rice utensil was observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC replaced rice scoop. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Inspector observed dishwashing staff (employed by facility management) drying dishes with a cloth. Facility management notified. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of food containers have an accumulation of previous sticker/label residue. PIC placed in 3 bay to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
